title: asthenatherum fragile
parts: Asthenatherum fragile has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and flowers. The roots of Asthenatherum fragile contain medicinal constituents like flavonoids, which are known for their antioxidant properties, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory effects. The leaves of this plant contain saponins and terpenoids, which are known for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, respectively. The flowers of Asthenatherum fragile contain anthocyanins, which have been reported to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
